title: leontopodium villosum
intro: Leontopodium villosum, also known as edelweiss, is a small, flowering plant native to the alpine regions of Europe and Asia. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Leontopodium villosum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting respiratory health due to its expectorant properties. Leontopodium villosum is traditionally prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies such as capsules and supplements.
